item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-048","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The first sentence immediately gives a corrective judgment and assigns definition ownership away from rhetoric: Prompt engineering is defined by model behavior/task results, not surface wording. The partial truth of wording effects is placed afterward, so it avoids the concession-first and field-list failure modes."}
